failedAssertions.reason: issueUpdate with non-UUID string id 'nonexistent' returns unhandled server error ({errors: [{message: 'Unexpected error.'}], data: null}) instead of graceful {success: false} response. UUID-format nonexistent IDs (e.g., 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000) are handled gracefully. The server needs to catch Prisma's invalid UUID format error and return success: false.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: curl (api-compat)' section with seed data details, isolation rules, and test data creation patterns for api-compat milestone testing
